author: y4rr
content: Implemented via commit cdf42d89. Decomposed Silu (Sigmoid+Mul) and Gelu (Div+Erf+Add+Mul+Mul via erf formula) into standard ONNX ops in the ir_graph_to_onnx emitter loop so exports no longer depend on opset-20 Gelu or a custom Silu op. Three dtype-matched initializers emitted for Gelu (sqrt(2), 0.5, 1.0). Re-enabled export_from_program(&ExportedProgram, path, config) against the current public API (graph/state_dict/input_shapes), with the same opset validation as other entry points. 7 new tests; 125 ferrotorch-serialize tests pass.
